title: Clash and Craft
description: Fight, clash, and explore the Clash Universe from Supercell's Clash of Clans and Clash Royale! Obtain special items, use magical abilities, and duel against all kinds of foes with this data pack installed.
body:
Overview:

Are you a fan of Clash of Clans and Clash Royale? Then this data pack is perfect for you! Unleash the ultimate gaming fusion with this mind-blowing data pack that seamlessly weaves the realms of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale, and even sprinkles in some Clash Mini magic into the Minecraft universe. Brace yourself for encounters with legendary figures like the indomitable Barbarian, the mystical Wizard, and the fearsome P.E.K.K.A. Engage in epic battles as you chart your destiny – be it dominating a village, embarking on an odyssey through the sprawling and diverse Clash world, clashing swords with formidable foes, forging powerful alliances, or engaging in heart-pounding duels against a rogues' gallery of Bosses. The choice is yours, and the adventure awaits!

Permission for some textures and code used in the Data pack and Resource pack can be respectively found in the gallery.

This content is not affiliated with, endorsed, sponsored, or specifically approved by Supercell and Supercell is not responsible for it. For more information see Supercell’s Fan Content Policy.

Before you play, I heavily advise you to read this:
  • Tools have all been retextured and given abilities, using Advanced Tooltips is encouraged so you can tell which item you're using.
  • All tool recipes have been changed, however, these are automatically unlocked each time the data pack is loaded.
  • Expect bugs, I tried my best to squash as many as I could find.
